# Works With Agents — UK Education

> UK mirror of the Works With Agents education platform. Same 10-pattern methodology, same course.
> **Status:** Specification. Content planned, not launched.
> **Full reference:** [llms-full.txt](https://workswithagents.co.uk/llms-full.txt)
> **Global:** [workswithagents.com/llms.txt](https://workswithagents.com/llms.txt)
> **API:** [workswithagents.dev/llms.txt](https://workswithagents.dev/llms.txt)
> Raw Markdown: `Accept: text/markdown`

## Overview

- [About](https://workswithagents.co.uk/index.md): UK mirror. Same 10 patterns. Based in Cardiff.
- [Founders](https://workswithagents.co.uk/about.md): Vilius & Pelin Vystartas. Cardiff.

## The Methodology

- [10 Patterns](https://workswithagents.co.uk/methodology/overview.md): Boot through Compounding.
- [Weekend Experiment](https://workswithagents.co.uk/methodology/weekend-experiment.md): 3 days. 111 web parts scaffolded autonomously.

## Courses — Coming Soon

- [Works With Agents: The 10 Patterns](https://workswithagents.co.uk/courses/ten-patterns.md): Flagship course. Self-paced. 10 modules.

*Pricing and launch dates to be announced.*

## Further Resources

- **Global:** [workswithagents.com](https://workswithagents.com/llms.txt)
- **API:** [workswithagents.dev](https://workswithagents.dev/llms.txt)
- **Blueprints:** [workswithagents.io](https://workswithagents.io/llms.txt)

## About

**Vilius Vystartas** — Technical founder. Power Platform Architect. Cardiff.
**Pelin Vystartas** — Co-owner. Business/compliance. Client relationships.
